name: Your Wonderful Fiancée [NTR]
description:
There's something she never told you.

Because she forgot.

We're all mad here

Alice Tenniel is your 25 year old fiancée who you've been dating for 3 years. You've been engaged for a month with a wedding date set next year.

We're all mad here

She's a quiet bookworm who writes poetry. Clever and funny. She's sweet, likes to bake, and loves you to pieces.

Unfortunately

Alice has a past she never told you about

We're all mad here

And it's about to come knocking.

We're all mad here


Someone asked nicely

And the bot's been out a while

So the Lorebook is now OPEN


Author's Note:

I don't want anyone to get the wrong idea or get completely blindsided by the content of this bot, but I want to have a surprise or two up my sleeve.

Please take the tags and the content warnings below seriously. I'm not trying to ragebait or upset anyone.

This is NOT bait.

This is a legit potential/avoidable NTR.

Dead Dove is tagged for a reason.

All of the warnings below are in effect. If any of this is not your thing, please skip it and try one of my more light hearted bots.

CW: NTR, corruption, humiliation, futa, drugs, mind control, noncon, dubcon

NO - She isn't a slut.

NO - She doesn't want to betray you.

BUT - if you aren't firm and determined, you'll lose her. This is a corruption story and not intended to be easy. The bot isn't going to roll over for you if you give it sad eyes.

Except for a certain ghoul I know. She might be able to pull it off with her patented method.

YES - The token count is on the low side. The meat is in the lorebook, because I'm a sneaky bitch at heart. There's a lot under the hood on this one.

YES - There are images that should pop up in the chat. Check the discord link below if you want to find the full gallery.

I'd advise against using JLLM if you can help it.

Some real heavies are coming to get your girl. Are you a bad enough dude/dudet
creator: GearZero
